name: Macaroni Salad for 100
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds fully cooked ham, cubed (5 to 6)
2 cans (5 3/4 oz.) pitted ripe olives, drained and sliced
8 ounces western or french salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all salad ingredients.
2. Combine all dressing ingredients in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad mixture and toss gently.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
